testcase.name: tc07_blogContentPresent

failure.message: No visible blog content found. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: tc09_firstBlogLinkNavigation

failure.message: Blog link click did not navigate. did not expect [https://www.vellinfotech.com/blog] but found [https://www.vellinfotech.com/blog]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Blog link click did not navigate. did not expect [https://www.vellinfotech.com/blog] but found [https://www.vellinfotech.com/blog] at
